---
title: "foundation-component-isolation-740 notes"
format: html
---

# Live notes

Diagnostic isolation experiment. Each iso_* ablation = baseline_multitask_repro + ONE new component on top.

## Bug-fixes applied vs foundation-mvp-740

- PMAE: EMA teacher (was: shared-weight teacher -> trivial collapse).
- UW-SO: per-task initial-loss normalization (was: raw losses, low-magnitude tasks dominated).

## Smoke results

(fill in)

## Per-ablation epoch-by-epoch

(fill in: read metrics_iso_*.json `history` field, plot val_win_auc + omega + mae stats)
